cover.subtitle:
석굴암에서 가야고분까지,
세 갈래의 등재 기록.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: three layered silhouettes — a Bulguksa pagoda outline on the left, a Joseon-era Jongmyo shrine roof in the middle, and a Gaya tomb mound on the right, all on a wide hanji-textured horizontal band. Above: a delicate hanji scroll suggesting Hunminjeongeum manuscript (no readable characters). Color palette: warm sepia + ink black + jade-green accent on the pagoda. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 등재 연도·분류(세계/기록/무형) 매칭이 핵심. 종묘=세계+종묘제례악=무형, 해인사=세계+대장경판=기록처럼 한 대상이 두 갈래로 등재된 케이스를 특히 주의.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of a stone pagoda and a hanji scroll (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
